song:
the joke isnt funny when ur the punchline - DethTech YEAH!
waking up everyday to a kick in the face all your dreams are gone you'll never leave this place made a habit of falling into holes (into holes) this joke is getting kinda old (old)
i've heard it a thousand times before and it's just not that funny anymore (anymore) now that everything's falling apart i'd dive over the edge for a new start (a new start) i I'll carve myself a chelsea smile like sad clowns are going out of style i'm so tired of getting pushed around can't wait to be six feet underground
it gets harder to breathe the longer i stay here under the weight of it all i'm better off alone i feel safe in my home oh it's all my fault
i've heard it a thousand times before and it's just not that funny anymore
now that everything's falling apart i'd dive over the edge for a new start (a new start) I've heard it a thousand times before And it's just not that funny anymore (anymore) Now that everything's fallin' apart I'd dive over the edge for a new start (a new start)
I'd dive over the edge for a new start I'd dive over the edge for a new start
